title: Bone Equipment
description:
Bone armor, tools, sword and horse armor can be crafted with bones!

Stronger than stone, but just a little less than iron.
body:
# Bone Equipment
![bone equipment icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/a2zUmIAU/images/225e1c35f2edf321fea88278c12b8518f5edb10a.png)

## Upgrade your survival gear with the Bone Equipment mod!

Struggling to find suitable equipment in the early stages of your Minecraft adventures? The Bone Equipment mod provides a resourceful solution by allowing you to craft durable tools and armor from bones. Ideal for those times when you're low on resources but need reliable gear.

## Features:

- Bone Tools: Craft a full set of tools, including pickaxe, axe, shovel, hoe, and sword, using bones.
- Bone Armor: Protect yourself with bone-crafted armor, offering decent protection for early gameplay.
- Accessible Recipes: Simple crafting recipes that seamlessly integrate with the vanilla Minecraft experience, ensuring ease of use.

## Survival Essentials:

- Perfect for early game survival when other materials might be scarce.
- Adds a unique aesthetic to your equipment, making your gear stand out.

## Balanced Gameplay:

- Provides a balanced alternative to stone tools and leather armor, giving you more options as you explore and survive.

With the Bone Equipment mod, you can turn common bones into valuable tools and armor, enhancing your survival experience and adding variety to your gear options. It's a practical and stylish addition to any Minecraft player's toolkit.

_Download now and bone up on your survival gear with the Bone Equipment mod!_

## Compatibility:

The Bone Equipment mod is compatible with the following Minecraft versions for Fabric:
- [1.21, 1.20 - 1.20.6, 1.19.4](https://modrinth.com/mod/bone-equipment/versions?l=fabric)

These versions for Quilt:
- [1.20.1](https://modrinth.com/mod/bone-equipment/versions?l=quilt)
